title: Savory Jamaican Crackers Crumble
description: A salty and flaky indulgent dish featuring rosemary, toastable texture, and raw-friendly options.

ingredients.name: Almond Flour
ingredients.notes: Preferably raw for a healthier option

instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine almond flour and caster sugar.
Add eggs one at a time, stirring well after each addition.
Stir in rosemary powder and salt until the mixture is smooth and crumbly.
If using raw almonds, add them to the dough now for extra crunch.
Form the dough into small balls or use your hands to shape it into thin sheets.
Place the shaped crackers on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Bake for 10-12 minutes until golden brown and slightly crispy.
Allow to cool completely before serving as a snack or dessert.
